dateOfHearing.description: The date of the hearing (civil/summons). Not required for enforcement which uses hearingDateFrom/hearingDateTo.

timeOfHearing.description: The actual start time of the hearing (civil/summons). Not required for enforcement.

hearingDateFrom.description: Start of the hearing date range for enforcement auto-listing.

hearingDateTo.description: End of the hearing date range for enforcement auto-listing (optional).
